enhancement_notes: Supplementary area profile with additional OSM-verified amenities not fully captured in the base profile, including 8 bakeries, barbers/hair salons, public art, bike infrastructure, and community services.

neighborhood_character.vibe: Historic NW 23rd Avenue commercial corridor; independent shops, diverse restaurants, porch culture
neighborhood_character.historic_significance: Part of Portland's Nob Hill (Homestead) neighborhood, one of the city's earliest developed areas
neighborhood_character.heritage_tree: Portland Heritage Tree #10 on NW 23rd Avenue
neighborhood_character.population_density: Urban residential with commercial ground-floor mixed-use along NW 23rd Ave

walkability.description: Daily errands do not require a car. This is a top-tier walkable neighborhood in Portland.

pedestrian_suitability.sidewalk_coverage: Excellent — continuous sidewalks on NW 23rd, NW Lovejoy, NW Northrup, all cross streets
pedestrian_suitability.pedestrian_crossings: Signalized intersections at all major cross streets (Marshall, Lovejoy, Northrup, Burnside)
pedestrian_suitability.pedestrian_safety: Moderate — NW 23rd is a relatively quiet residential/commercial street; vehicle speeds are low
pedestrian_suitability.shade_trees: Street trees along most blocks of NW 23rd Avenue and cross streets

bicycle.bike_infrastructure: Cycle tracks on NW 21st and NW 18th; bike lanes connecting NW 23rd to downtown; Biketown stations available
bicycle.bike_share: Biketown stations available; nearest at NW 23rd & Marshall area
bicycle.bike_parking: Bike racks at street corners; Cyclepath West (bike shop) at 2714 NW Thurman

items.name: Vaux's Swifts
items.description: Swifts fly into Chapman Elementary chimney during September sunsets

items.name: Chapman Elementary School grounds
items.note: Site of Vaux's Swifts chimney (September migration spectacle)

parks_and_natural_features.waterways: No major waterways within 1km; nearest is the Willamette River ~1.5km south

community_services.food: Exceptional diversity — 90+ restaurants including Thai, Burmese, Indian, Greek, Mexican, Italian, Vietnamese, Korean, Latin, American; 12+ cafes; 8 bakeries
community_services.healthcare: 6 facilities incl 2 pharmacies, 1 medical center, 1 dermatology, 1 primary care, 1 CVS/Walgreens
community_services.grocery: 3 options — convenience store at 173m, convenience store at 876m, full supermarket at 955m; 8 bakeries
community_services.services: Banks (Chase, etc.), pharmacy, post office, ATM nearby; hair salons and barbers; bike shop; car repair
community_services.parking: Multiple surface lots + 1 multi-storey (PMC at 1313 W Burnside) within 1500m; street parking available

nearby_by_radius.200m: 11+ restaurants of different cuisines, cafes, pharmacy (38m), grocery (173m), 8 bakeries, artwork
nearby_by_radius.500m: Transit stop (128m), parks, artwork, museums, bike shops, additional restaurants and cafes
nearby_by_radius.1000m: Full 90 restaurants, 6 healthcare, 8 transit stops, 22 shops, 11 fitness facilities, 8 bakeries, EV charging

limitations_noted: No dedicated entertainment venues (cinema, theater) within 1km
Only 2 schools within 1km (no K-8 or high school nearby)
Only 3 grocery stores within 1km (limited for a family of 4+)
No dedicated dog parks within 1km (nearest at Riverside Park ~1.5km)
Limited independent gym options — LA Fitness and chain gyms dominate
No public restroom facilities identified within 1km (case-by-case, e.g., libraries, cafes)

data_sources.analysis_method: OSM-based neighborhood scoring via OSRM routing + OSM API + area exploration + nearby places search
data_sources.contributor_note: Enhanced area profile compiled from comprehensive OSM exploration including detailed bakery, cafe, art, culture, shop, and services listings using area exploration and nearby places search tools. Additional details beyond the base profile.
